lines.speaker: Yadech Strongarm
lines.text: Ah, hello there, warrior.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me a bit about skillcapes?

lines.speaker: Yadech Strongarm
lines.text: Sure. You can buy a skillcape when you reach level 99 in a skill. Apart from boosting your statistics in that skill, they can also be used to perform some pretty amazing emotes!

lines.speaker: Yadech Strongarm
lines.text: The Cape of Strength also provides you with unlimited teleports to our guild. Is there anything else you would like to know?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What can I do here?

lines.speaker: Yadech Strongarm
lines.text: Ahh, the shot put is a great test of strength and can be quite rewarding. Mind you do it properly though, you might want to dust your hands with some powdery substance first. It'll give better grip.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll remember that. What should I use?

lines.speaker: Yadech Strongarm
lines.text: I personally prefer ground ashes, it makes a nice fine powder and gives some really good grip.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, what else?

lines.speaker: Yadech Strongarm
lines.text: Basically you'll need to go in there, make sure you've got nothing cluttering up your hands, pick up a shot and throw it.... depending upon your technique, you can get quite long throws.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What was your best?

lines.speaker: Yadech Strongarm
lines.text: Ahh that would be telling...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why are you wielding a tree branch?

lines.speaker: Yadech Strongarm
lines.text: Well...there's a story to that. You see, I should have an axe but-

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sloane's axe?

lines.speaker: Yadech Strongarm
lines.text: My axe. He won it because of a squirrel.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A squirrel?

lines.speaker: Yadech Strongarm
lines.text: He bet me that I couldn't catch the squirrel while still holding my axe, but that he could... Thing is, he tricked me! When it was his turn, he just chopped the tree down!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. That doesn't explain why you have a tree branch though.

lines.speaker: Yadech Strongarm
lines.text: A barbarian warrior is bound to his axe. I cannot take up another, so I use part of the tree that Sloane cut down as my weapon... It also reminds me of him.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: He was a great warrior.

lines.speaker: Yadech Strongarm
lines.text: Yes, and a good friend, Still, he would want us to be happy that he is now with his warrior brethren. Can I help you with anything else?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: May I claim my tokens please?

lines.speaker: Yadech Strongarm
lines.text: I'm afraid you have not earned any tokens yet. Try some of the activities around the guild to earn some.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, I'll go see what I can find.

lines.speaker: Yadech Strongarm
lines.text: You don't have space to carry them.

lines.speaker: Yadech Strongarm
lines.text: Of course! Here you go, you've earned [amount] tokens!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Bye!

lines.speaker: Yadech Strongarm
lines.text: Be well, warrior [player name].

lines.speaker: Yadech Strongarm
lines.text: Ah, hello there, warrior.

lines.speaker: Yadech Strongarm
lines.text: Ah, but I can see you are already as strong as is possible! Perhaps you have come to me to purchase a Cape of Strength, and thus join the elite few who have mastered this exacting skill?

lines.speaker: Yadech Strongarm
lines.text: As an additional recognition of your achievement, the Cape of Strength can teleport you to our guild.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: May I have another hood for my cape, please?

lines.speaker: Yadech Strongarm
lines.text: You don't appear to have enough space in your inventory, come back and see me when you do.

lines.speaker: Yadech Strongarm
lines.text: Most certainly, and free of charge!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: May I buy a Skillcape of Strength, please?

lines.speaker: Yadech Strongarm
lines.text: Hmm, yes, you certainly look strong enough. That'll be 99000 gold coins, please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, that's just too much to pay.

lines.speaker: Yadech Strongarm
lines.text: Not at all; there are many other adventurers who would love the opportunity to purchase such a prestigious item! You can find me here if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sure.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But, unfortunately, I don't have enough money with me.

lines.speaker: Yadech Strongarm
lines.text: Well, come back and see me when you do.

lines.speaker: Yadech Strongarm
lines.text: Unfortunately all Skillcapes are only available with a free hood, it's part of a skill promotion deal; buy one get one free, you know. So you'll need to free up some inventory space before I can sell you one.

lines.speaker: Yadech Strongarm
lines.text: Excellent! Wear that cape with pride my friend.
